title: Lava to Acid
description: Changes the lava to lcid and Lava Buckets to Acid Buckets
body:
Changes lava to acid and changes lava bucket textures to acid buckets. I plan to make another pack around this soon so keep tuned!

Here is another download link for [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/lava-to-acid/)
